review_text:
Had a powered sight with plenty of space
Facilities were immaculate and the grounds were well looked after
Definitely one of the better parks in Australia
Very friendly and positive staff helped us to have a very pleasant and peaceful holiday
We will return
Old council park but with lovely managers. Amenities spotless and great drive through sites after long WET drive from Rockhampton
Great little park. Not overpriced.
I am surprised there were no reviews for this lovely well cared for park. The manager are very friendly and helpful. They even had free pet washing machine. Each site surrounded by hedge.

The reception was already warm and we received so many good tips on where and what we could see or do. We had a wonderful quiet place, the amenities were extremely clean, bright, and spacious. For us, highlights included free access (no cost) to the swimming pool and being able to be at the golf course within a 5-minute walk.

We stayed here for a week and enjoyed our stay. It’s a small welcoming park and the staff and permanents were all friendly. Super convenient spot with easy access to the Whitsunday Coast. Dog friendly which is great and this was the first park we’ve come across that has a dedicated washing machine for pet bedding 👍
Unpowered site for the night, was great. Full shade under the trees.  Ablutions were spotless.  Thanks team

Stayed on powered site
Ammenities maintained at very high standard
Staff were all very welcoming and knowledgeable including local knowledge
Will definitely return
Un des meilleurs qualité prix de notre périple Cairns Sydney. Tout y est sanitaire propres et piscine olympique. Dommage que la pluie ne nous ai pas permis d'en profiter davantage.

Hubby + I stayed on a site here for 4 weeks + had such an awesome time. Glen + Robyn are so friendly  + went out of their way to help us while there. Glen even made lovely new tables for the bbq area, such great work done 👌 The amenities too are absolutely spotless + the camp kitchen has all you need. Having the pool next door was a bonus too. We had a well priced and enjoyable stay. Would 100% recommend this park + will be back.  Thank you all.
Great place clean great service Big sites

Excellent parc. Nous sommes restés 2 nuits dans un unpowered site, sur un terrain de pelouse très bien entretenu.
C’est très calme, géré par des gens adorables, et les amenities sont très propres.
Je recommande.

I would love to say a very big thank you to management & Nell for you love & support in this very upsetting time ive had
Wonderful help very clean toilets & showers great BBQ area peaceful & quiet accommodating with my dogs & I really appreciate your kind hospitality 10/10
A fabulous park. Would have to say they are the cleanest Amenities I have seen, in all my travels. Well done team !
Nice big sites
This was a lovely little park with grass powered sites. Clean amenities and good laundry.
Great park away from the highway. Free entry in to the town pool next door.

Lovely caring owners who were so helpful when my husband had to go to hospital overnight. Clean facilities and well set out.
We’ll be back! Thanks again Glen & Robyn

Hello. I stayed in my caravan in this park 3 weeks ago and can genuinely say it was one of the best places I have ever stayed. Firstly the staff namely Kate, Robyn and Nell were truely wonderful, helpful and friendly a pleasure to deal with. Everyone will be amazed at the fabulously clean amenities. The showers are spacious and hot. Basically everything was first class and we will definately return one day.  Recommended xx
Lovely caravan park with very helpful caretakers. Everything is clean and beautiful.  Highly recommend

My husband and I and our 3 dogs, Mindy, Morko and Wilmah have short stay but was lovely stay and excellent, friendly staff, convenient location, amenities very clean and modern. We want to say special thank you especially to Kate, the reception and many hands. She makes us feel very welcome. Nice to meet you too.

While travelling, we had electrical problems with our caravan which meant an unscheduled stop.  When we contacted this park, the helpful management found an emergency site for us even though it was fully booked.   Not only did they provide accommodation, but Glen (manager)  also arranged for one of the locals in the park to fix our wiring at no cost, a task that took about two hours. This was help above what we expected and we are very grateful.   Thanks to Kate, Robyn, Glen and Paul for making a difficult time much better. |

We had a great 2 night stay here. The staff were incredibly helpful, friendly and cheerful. The grass and the grounds are lush and well kept and the facilities are clean and tidy. It's
Great value for the price and it's not too far from airlie Beach.

Fantastic friendly and super cheap!! The cleanest bathrooms and hottest showers, amazing pool for the kids and camp kitchen with everything you could possibly need! 100% recommend you stay here you won’t be disappointed
Great management. Very clean and well kept.  Amenities are spotless
Nice park
Only stayed one night
Great little Park very clean amenities, very friendly managers and staff.
Helpful manager, well kept grounds, walking distance to the CBD

Very clean park management was friendly
Found that the amenities were cleaned at about 9am to me this was a silly time as check out is 10am

We stay here fairly often as we have family nearby.  The amenities are always clean but I do have one issue and that is that it would be nice if they could wait until 10 am checkout time  before closing the amenities.  People are often trying to beat the clock after breakfast and packing up before checking out and for elderly people its not always easy to have to go nextdoor to the pool to use the toilets when they advertise that they close the CP amenties from 9am -11am but we try to visit shortly before 9 and already closed.

1st impressions always count   and here was no different , really friendly,  helpful lady in the office,  amenities were immaculate  and the tarrif was excellent,
Thanks Dave n Elaine

We stayed here for two nights @$46 a night and were happy with what was offered.   The female manager was so friendly and helpful and is doing a fabulous job.   Park is well maintained and amenities really clean with unexpected touches such as cleaning cloths and cleaning sprays available in the cubicles.   This is a Council owned park so no wifi available but the local library was great and a pleasant place to spend an hour or two catching up with emails and planning.   There was also a great op shop:  The Big Blue Shed that is so crammed with stuff that it was fun just poking around it.   Hubby played golf which was 100m from the park.  Recommend booking ahead as it can get busy in peak times.

We had a powered site there for 2 days. Very enjoyable friendly staff clean amenities. Very quite. Also the use of public pool next door.50mtr main pool kiddies pool and a waterpark. Very reasonable rates 44pn. Thanku again
Lovely managers and clean facilities. Lots of long term residents some making the park look run down.  Grounds struggling probably due to extreme rain.

Hi myself and my partner planned to camp there for 1 night, we ended up staying for three nights and a day! The staff and management are really nice and sound, facilities are excellent and clean! Showers, toilets a little cafe and then the most beautiful lake to swim in, would definitely stay there again😊😊
A really clean and calm campsite ! We had a great time there. Nice people !

Great experience in this campground.
The staff is extra nice, prices are very reasonable, the location is great and the bathroom very very clean. I never saw such a clean bathroom in a camping.
Very good and clean amenities in the  2 kitchens.

It is also located next to the swimming pool, free of charge, large and great for some swimming. Just bring some goggles, something weird is in that water so don't open your eyes underwater, trust me!

Overall great place, clean, functional and very neat. Recommended

Stayed here working for nearly 6 months. Amenities are always spotless and the grounds are well maintained.  Plenty of shady trees but beware with trees come tree inhabitants and they all shit. Our set up was all brand new so anxiety was up there the first few days. Robyn and Glen are great hosts and the positives far out way any negative people might find. Will definitely stay again.
Such a great campsite. Free access to 50m pool. The kitchen is quite average but the toilets and showers are good and spotless! Great value for money too ($38 for powered).

Perfect place to camp! Staff is very friendly and professional, camping spots are wide, and there are multiple facilities. Toilets are perfectly clean (need code to enter), there are some BBQs and fully equipped kitchens (also very well cleaned). There is a little garden and a pretty big swimming pool. You can enjoy some restaurants in the neighbourhood and use the courtesy bus. People are friendly and quiet. We even enjoyed some free pumpkins! Prices are very good for what the camping offers. We had a great time and  we strongly recommend it!
Stayed on a powered site. Could not fault anything. Robyn super helpful and  we loved the clean amenities. Would recommend.
Very helpful staff,  immaculate park, amenities were spotless absolutely beautiful.  Well done.
Our stay was brilliant. The staff were very friendly, the amenities and grounds were excellent. Friendly people who were staying at the park To top it off the pool was great.
Nice park very tidy.
Great park to explore Proserpine and surrounds. Fantastic manager very welcoming and offered lots of info in the area. Ultra clean amenities.  Thanks for the enjoyable stay
Great central location - very friendly supportive staff
Clean and tidy. Well maintained camp ground. Great spot right next to the public pool and watermark with free entry
Very peaceful camp.Great place to fish(didnt catch a thing) if you have a boat.We tried off the pontoon but no prize. Highly recommend Lake Proserpine.

easy drive up frpm Proserpine through the cane.
polite friendly checkin.
lots of space in top camp area with lots of camps on foreshaw.
Mown area with fire pits look out over the dam.
Really amazing place, the lake is beautiful, also Mark and Brett are very kind :)

Fantastic place for a few days  no power or water for camping and Caravans.
Showers and toilets clean with easy access.
Great camp site, clean amenities in good condition. Beautiful views and great sunsets.

Absolutely amazing Glamping experience! Ilze from Lake Proserpine Glamping made our experience so special, easy to navigate and was more than happy to accommodate my family of 5 and our puppy. Will DEFINITELY be doing that again.

As first time campers we wanted to try somewhere local for a night, so we could practice our set up before heading on a road trip next month. The team were so accommodating when we established we didn't have the right tools for our inverter (to blow up the air mattress)!

A great spot, beautiful location. It was so wonderful to see so many people taking advantage of the area.

We'll definitely be back!

We had the most wonderful, romantic weekend getaway staying in one of the fabulous Glamping Tents at the Lake Proserpine Holiday Park.  Absolutely EVERYTHING was provided for us, right down to the spare dental pack (just in case you forget your toothbrush) to stunning little night lights and coffee supplies for the morning.  There was no need to worry about buying firewood or ice of the esky - everything was there and all presented so beautifully.  I would recommend the glamping tents to anyone wanting the relaxed feeling of camping without having to pack a thing except a fresh change of clothes.  Thanks  Izle - you went above and beyond and we cannot wait to come again!

Great location to take the family camping either in a tent or caravan. Plenty of space close to the water or behind the kiosk,either way the amenities block is in the middle beside the kiosk close for all. Heaps of shady spots, lovely breeze and not far to go to Airlie for a day trip. Kids can enjoy catching red clawing off the bank,as we caught a feed for 3.
Was a great weekend with the kids enjoying camping boating swimming thanks aliza
Plenty of room for our caravan, great facilities for families.
Great camping very clean toilets and showers really friendly staff iize at office was very friendly and helpful with everything you need 5 stars
Awesome stay beautiful environment and very clean

I arrived late afternoon/early evening.  The female staff member was very friendly and accommodating to help me familiarise myself with the motorhome camping area.
She offered the wifi that the park provides which is Starlink satellite based.  That was handy but old phone couldn't connect.  Other newer phone could.
It was pouring with rain the whole time (wet season) so dam already starting to flood.  I chose higher ground.  Wet grounds and no dry base to park, but this is a national park so don't expect asphalt grounds.  No problem.  Showers and toilets clean.  Some basic provisions at the shop there if you needed before closing.  I was only transiting so stayed just one night.  I would have liked to have stayed more but flood warnings and no time.

Brilliant location for the whole family.  Lots of space, beautiful outlook over the water.  Clean bathroom facilities. Awesome team hosting the park - helpful, knowledgeable & friendly.  No designated sites.  Fires allowed (unless there's a fire ban). Barra can be caught from the jetty.  Well worth stopping in.

Absolutely fantastic in every way. From the location, to the facilities and staff we could not fault. The location is beautiful with an abundance of birds, swans and ducks. The toilets and showers are clean and well maintained. The staff (Brett) the caretaker who met is friendly and helpful and a real nice guy! Dogs are welcome and ours had a great time as did we. Camp fires are allowed and the onsite kiosk sells wood and other goodies. All at a cost of $20pn, you really can’t go wrong. We stayed for 3 nights and didn’t want to leave this morning. We will definitely be back! Thank you!
Great camping experience Clean facilities, well-maintained grounds, and a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere. Perfect spot to unwind and enjoy the outdoors — would happily stay again.

Lovely caravan park. Awesome staff and amenities are so clean
Very quiet park normally
But today a guy two down from us thought the was working in a engineering shop
Bloody grinder most of the day

Great park awesome staff very friendly & very helpful they went out of their way to accomodate a site right next to our friends Brenda & Wade we stayed 2 nights very relaxing having the local pool next door was a bonus the site was great amenities were spotless shower pressure was fantastic cannot fault this park if my partner & myself are ever in the area we shall return keep up the good work Proserpine tourist park 👍😉

Booked in for a week (2+ weeks ago)
Ended up staying on another week. Left here Saturday morning the 7th.
Fantastic park, Managers and Staff are all very friendly and welcoming. The Launceston Lass 😁 was a pleasure to deal with.

Amenities are top class, always very clean.

Pool next door was a welcome break on the hot days. And free... A real bonus.

Will definitely stay here again. 10 outa 10. 👍🏻👍🏻

Gus and Kerrie Brisbane.
Excellent. Very clean and friendly. Pool next door and golf course. Well done.
Fantastic stop over, friendly staff, easy walk to town, the free public pool next door is an added bonus 😀
연 이틀 밴파크에서 운영하는 수영장에서 모닝 수영을 하니 진짜 여행하는 기분이나 좋음. 어메니티도 관리가 잘되어 깨끗함.
Great place at $36 a night for an unpowered site, at this time of the year

Ideal für einen Stopp vor Airlie Beach. Ruhig gelegener Caravan Park abseits des Highway am Ortsrand mit direktem, kostenlosen Zugang zum beheizten Freibad! Sehr sauber und gepflegt, äußerst günstig. Die Inhaber sind äußerst freundlich und liebenswert, helfen unkomplizierte wo immer es geht. Vielen Dank!!
Had a great 2 week stay on a powered site. Very friendly staff, exceptionally clean amenities and tidy grounds. Highly recommended park 👍

What an Awesome park cannot recommend this enough!! . Caretaker Robyn So Friendly Happy and Helpful. Amenities Very Clean Best Showers and Local Radio Station going in there to top it off. Great powered site grassed private and roomy. We certainly hope to return one day Thank You For our Most Enjoyable Stay. Cheers Sue n Barry 🤗
Great place to stay but the male care taker was a bullying jerk. So rude and trying to intimidate.
Nice park. Bit dusty and lots of trees

Fantastic people went out of their way to help us also in provided good local info on things to do and see ,the park was nice well cared for and full of good friendly people , amenities were clean and well maintained ,will go back .
Great park great management team clean toilets pool next door a gem of a place to stay

We were very well looked after when needing a repair job on our caravan by local BJ, Caravan & Camper Parts & Repairs.  The caravan park helped us accomodate this and we loved staying at this beautiful park with such clean facilities.  Thank you  Proserpine 🙏🙏

Currently staying at a powered site. This is our 4th stay. Cannot fault this Park. Managers/?owners go out of their way to assist, are very friendly and accommodating. Park manicured an amenities are spotless, pleasantly spacious and well appointed. Sites very reasonably sized and separate from other sites. FREE heated Olympic sized pool right next door with kids water world as well, golf club only metres away. Pet friendly and huge areas to walk your dog nearby. Quiet park with no road noise, safe area.
Dump point both in Park and roadway outside.
You will have to drive for eateries and shops.
Easy distance from Airlie Beach, without the $$ of parks there.
Will continue to stay here every time we pass through. 5 stars.
A very good park, close drive to shops etc, well maintained and great amenities

Very rude staff,
New Year’s Eve and got upset about a bit of noise. We were previously told that the 8 o’clock quite time rule doesn’t apply because of the occasion. Then were yelled at with a sexist comment among other things.
The water the was coming out of the womans toilet tap smelt as though it was coming straight from the damn it stunk.
Will not be coming back and don’t recommend if you want to have a good time and make sure to dodge the exposed wire right next to the showers :)
Small room for camping, terrible service, way too expensive and just not a good experience.
Great quiet and affordable campsite right on the lake. Beautiful sunset spot and dog friendly. Toilet & shower facilities were very well maintained.
Peaceful setting. Lots of space. Jolly service. Keep awnings in or loose it with sudden gusts of winds.

Just an overnight stop for us but we’ll definitely be back for a much longer stay. Stunning spot.  Lots of space with or without shade.  Really nice helpful staff. A kiosk and good toilets & showers . Kids swimming in the lake off the pontoon, so much bird life.  Dog friendly & just $20 a night!! |Only downside for us , literally millions of mozzies after dark!! Had to go in, never seen anything like it , but could have been the time of year we were there ? |Absolutely recommend this beautiful spot

Travelling Aussies 🇦🇺

It’s a gamble, driving 20+km from the highway in the hope of finding a rewarding camp at the end of the road

We found Lake Proserpine to be a relaxing break from travel but probably wouldn’t visit again 🥲

Camped on dust, no facilities on the lakeside camps, typical freshwater dam with no clean swimming access and fellow campers right in your shadow and no dump point 🥲

We commend the friendly helpful staff at the check-in / kiosk, clean demountable toilets & showers on the inland side of the park and a good pontoon for boaties & fishing 🎣

We couldn’t help notice that some of the surfaced waterfront day use areas before the camp ground, looked more attractive than the campground.  No dirt and with great views over the dam

Glad we visited but just not our cup of tea

This is the second time that we stayed at one of the beautiful glamping tents. Such a wonderful experience, relaxing and peaceful. Ilze and Mark made us feel so welcome both times and we will definitely be back whenever we need a night away.
Awesome place.
Nice place to relax for a few days, if you’ve got a boat it would be good to. The grey water zones are a bit odd, I can understand if your ear the water.

Me and my partner just stayed a night in one of the beautiful glamping tents, and it’s safe to say, we will absolutely be back! I don’t think we’ve stopped talking about it since we’ve left. Mark and Ilze have created something really special, apart from the scenery and wildlife being incredible, they have put so much thought into absolutely every detail. They were so helpful throughout the entire process too. Would absolutely recommend, perfect for a special occasion or just a night away 💛
Pretty location with lots of space. Clean modern amenities and Ilze is the host with the most! Highly recommended!

$30 for 2 in campervan overnight. Unless you're into fishing, boating, or holidaying with kids there's not much to do. If you're just going for a look there's several parking areas just before the camp with equally nice views. I mention this as you won't pick up camp Wifi far beyond the kiosk (not cheap, but neither are Proserpine supermarkets) and there's no (Optus) mobile coverage as you're nestled in mountains which I suspect might also block terrestrial TV reception. Not complaining ... expected this, just noting for other travellers. For number of people there there's  very limited, but spotless, amenities. Unisex showers, if anyone's squeamish about that. No camp kitchen, though there are fire pits around. Too windy, gather it's normally like that, for camp stoves. Didn't find potable water on site. Friendly check in, you can pick your own site. Enjoyed it, but would not return.
Beautiful camping spots. No power or water available. Toilets and showers onsite. Great place to get back to nature.

Excellent location, get in early for best spots.
Non-reserve system.
Toilets and showers new and very clean.
Telstra 4g  4 bars.   Wifi excellent
Quiet little park, dated amenities but very clean. Pool next door.
Super friendly staff, nice maintained campground with laundry, showers and toilets and you can even use the swimming pool next door

Just a short walk (950mt) to the main shopping area. The park is located in a very quiet area in Proserpine with free access to the town pool. The park has excellent amenities and large level sites for your van. The staff are great.

Super Campingplatz, super nette Inhaber, toller Service alles tip top sauber. Das war der beste Campingplatz auf unserer 2-wöchigen Tour von Sydney nach Carins.
Vielen Dank 👍👍🫶

This place is a little gem, Robyn and Glen are super friendly and keep this park cleaner than any other park I've been in. The price is great, its pet friendly and right next door to a fantastic swimming pool.
Absolutely recommend this caravan park. Robyn was amazing so lovely and helpful. Highly recommend this park. Big cement slabs in this park also.Definitely see again in our travels.
Very tidy well maintained
Very friendly and helpful staff. I was having car troubles and they bent over backwards to help me. Amenities were nice and clean. And the grounds were beautiful. Thanks alot

Would not stay here again we booked for a couple of night in advance and told them what we had and that we had some big dogs they said it was fine, but when we got there just as we went to set up they came and told us we had to leave they are highly rude and the manager was half drunk. Not a place for children
Staying long term for work. Awesome place, friendly staff and residents. Highly recommend. With the pool next door it's great.

Great little park. Everything kept clean and they even rang us after we left about the random things we left behind and a possible noise disturbance (which we didn’t hear)… pool and water park is awesome, but be aware it closes early
Had a powered site. Good park. Access to the swimming pools next door. Friendly and very clean. Great with kids. $34 per night. Close to Airlie Beach.  Don't pay Airlie Beach prices.
We stayed for 1 night. Friendly staff and everything is clean and tidy. Free access to the pool and water park next door. 100% recommend. Would definitely stay again.

Nette Leute, Pool, Barbecue Station, saubere sanitär Anlagen - alles was man fürs Camping braucht!
Kann man nur empfehlen
This park is full of permanent sites, needs work
Best price in the area with a tent
Clean and tidy staff helpful
Fantastisk lille plads venlig betjening gode faciliteter
Friendly staff, clean amenities.  Well cared for park  Lovely place to stay.

Remembered this park on a previous trip to the local swimming pool. Every other park booked out on the Public holiday, we booked fairly late (week before) and we managed to secure a powered site for our camper trailer. Kids enjoyed riding round the park on their bikes, and meeting the various pets on site, shower and toilet block perfectly clean and functional. Town aquatic centre is next door, walk into town for supplies, couple of eateries near by, Airlie on your doorstep...but we didn't even bother. Go Proserpine!!!  Yeah, sure there are more fancy parks to stay at, but if you are a real family, with a real budget, this is the real park for you. Ocst effective, great location, and clean, clean, clean.  Thank you for the caretakers of the park, the place is well cared for and we can clearly see you take pride and put a lot of effort into it every second of every day. We will be back for sure, thank you! Should be proud of yourselves!

We picked the right day to stay, the camping site had only one other visitor, after full up for weeks before. Quiet and clean with a great pool. Easy walk to town if in the mood. Good, basic spot, lovely friendly hosts with great facilities.

Toilets were really clean and check-in staff was very friendly and helpful. Lots of space to spread out and we really enjoyed our one night stay.

Only drawback for some campers might be the lack of a gas stove/induction plate and electric kettle at the camp kitchen, there’s only the hot plate and a microwave.
If clean is your dream, this is the place to be seen! Managers are awesome  and the park is run to a very high standard

Meet gay was staying there she seemed nice room for improvement but nice plenty of amenities was a little disappointed by no understanding of rates didnt see a sign animal friendly plenty of rubbish bins needed emptying

Stayed here as a family of 4 and 2 dogs. Made to feel very welcome. Stayed in the unpowered area of the caravan park. Nice sized sites. Immaculate facilities. Friendly atmosphere. Great laundry. Even a free washing machine available to wash your pets' bedding. Managers are very friendly and give lots of advice about local tourist attractions. Free heated pool next door with a water park for the kids. Planned to stay 2 nights but stayed 4.
site was great
Very friendly staff and residents, super clean facilities, free pool and water park next door and so close to shops and amazing tourist spots to visit.
Such a helpful and friendly couple that run the park went out of their way to help us out The cleanest bathrooms ive come across yet on our travels around Australia. Lovely easy walk into town !!
Great, friendly & clean park to stay, would stay again.
The cleanest amenities I have ever had at a caravan park. This was a lovely quiet park where everyone was friendly. We have kids and the waterpark next door was a huge hit.

What an absolutely beautiful caravan park.. sweet kids running around having a ball, the staff are all so friendly and welcoming and the bathrooms!!! Omg the cleanest I have seen on our travels, great showers aswell.. top place so happy we stumbled upon it! Keep up the great work everyone it's so appreciated 🥰 oh and must mention the free public pool right next door, awesome friendly staff there aswell!! ❤
Best amenities ever. So clean and functional. Great hosts. Lovely spot. Recommend.
Awesome place to stay. Managers were wonderful. Lovely clean amenities. Great sized unpowered sites. Highly recommend.
Staff are very helpful and friendly clean ablution blocks just need to get the wifi working near the lake.

Fantastic camp ground, quiet, serene, wonderful clean amenities,  kiosk has a great range of supplies and the staff are awesome!! Peak season prices till Sept but still super affordable...our favourite 2 3 night getaway  on a regular basis...
Beautiful spot to camp up for a couple of days.
Great facilities

Awesome campsite with super clean amenities. Good hot showers with clean facilities and good staff too. We stayed multiple nights over the course of a week and had no issues getting in and out of the campsite even with the rain. The road to Proserpine was no dramas.
Amazing place! Super quiet and beautiful. Still open during wet season and it doesn't get flooded.

My girlfriend and I have just spent a night at this campsite. It's really great. We would have liked to spend more time there. We'll be back in June to visit the Whitsundays and we'll definitely be staying here. The staff are great, very accommodating and friendly. What's more it's not expensive! Only 10 aud. per person for a huge camp with clean toilets and clean hot showers😍 on the lake.
No mosquitoes. Beautiful geese, wallabies and black swans wandering around.
I highly recommend this campsite, whether you want to spend the day in the lake or enjoy the sunrise/sunset and spend the night.
See you soon!

Stayed there for two nights next to the beautiful lake. The toilets and the free 3-minute hot shower were super clean. Met the friendly owner at the campground café and even got a free coffee after a nice chat—though don’t expect one when you visit. ;)
All in all, we had a nice stay surrounded by cows and geese in the middle of nature. Definitely recommend this place if you’re traveling to Airlie Beach or the surrounding region.
Absolutely gorgeous loved it

Amazing ! Big camp, clean toilets and clean showers (hot water), BBQ, 20$/night
40min from Airlie beach

Amazing place for camping. Not too full, really good staff. The showers have 3-minute hot water and are very clean, especially in the middle of the day. Beautiful sunsets, good vibes, and cheaper rates make the camping area one of the best unpowered sites I have ever been to.

Stayed twice and loved it both times. Busy in August, but still great. Very quiet and serene in December. Swimming off the jetty, catching Barra, cattle roaming free, bird life galore. Very relaxed owners, can park where you want etc . Amenities clean. Staff very friendly.
Best location over the lake and sunset. Second times in that place and still loving it

Great camping spot next to the lake. Only $10 pp per night with great amenities and a cafe with basic store
Definitely recommend.
Swimming, canoeing, boats.

Just spent a week here. Amenities very clean and kept tidy. Bus stop outside park can do a hop on or off to Airlie Beach and Shute harbour or to Proserpine town. Town also in walking distance. Great not having to drive or find parking. Enjoyed our stay a WELL KEPT PARK full credit to the Managers. Thankyou

Great place where stay!
Quite, clean, cheap and plenty of trees and so close to the amazing heated public pool

Excellent small park with great managers - Glen & Robyn made us feel at home immediately upon arrival and offered excellent local knowledge.
Park amenities were very clean and there were plenty of them.
We'll be back.
Lovely park. Clean amenities. Need to drive to the shops though.
A great caravan park.
Good place for stop over and visit area, cleanest amenities I've seen. Hospitable manager. And pool next door. The best
Personnel was very friendly. Calmful/affordable place to stay. Toilets were perfectly clean. I highly recommed. And only around 20minutes to airliebeach.
Good location & easy travel to get there. Amenities are kept clean. Friendly young man/ caretaker

Beautiful campground by the lake
$10 per person per night
Toilets Showers and a small shop.
Firepits or you can use your own
So relaxing so peaceful highly recommend

Ilze and Mark are the most accommodating hosts we’ve ever come across. So helpful and lovely all the time. The Glamping tent is absolutely fabulous, detailed with such love and care. Daily service was fantastic. The whole experience staying here was so relaxing and comfortable and the scenery is breathtaking. Amenities are clean and tidy and the kiosk well stocked with those items you forget or run out of. We highly recommend this hidden Gem and hoping to be back soon.

Great campgrounds
Amazing sunsets over the lake
Plenty of room between the campsites

Fantastic location. A wharf where you can fish but shore line lots of reeds. A cute little kiosk with bits and pieces not far from the toilets and showers. A few big ducks roaming around. A great camp.

It was beautiful!
One of the best campsite we have done
For 14$ great location and good amnesties
Unbelievable spot friendly staff clean amenities

One of the most picturesque and serene campsites we've been too.

The sunset across the lake is stunning and once set, the stars are on full display as the light pollution is nonexistent.

The owners of the site are very friendly, at the time it cost us 28 bucks for an unpowered plot for 2 people, which we think is reasonable.

Highly recommended!
Awesome campground!  Beautiful scenery.  Great, friendly staff, well stocked little shop in the kiosk.

Although it was wet and miserable when we visited it was a nice surprise, a very nice looking campground with very reasonable rates!
There is also a little kiosk that provides a variety of grocery items and brews fresh coffee.
There was little chance of fishing, but there was a ton of birds and other wildlife to look at, inclusive of a magnificent wedge tail eagle and a falcon or two
Great camping

The lake itself is stunning.
The staff are friendly.
But there is cheap toilet paper for the paying customers to use.
Keeps tearing off...and its too thin.
No proper taps in toilet.
Didnt see a tap to refill caravan tanks.
It was the scenery that saved it.
This was a spectacular camp site
Plenty  of camp sites and has toilets and showers
Big campground lots of grass good swimming in the lake and plenty of fish I am told.
Stunning views. Clean and tidy camp sites. Lovely people. Pet friendly. Would 100 percent recommend coming here with your friends and family.
How beautiful is this place. We loved stay here
Good spot near the water. Well maintained amenities. Fire pits available and wood for sale in the shop.

Lovely an relaxing place
My puppies love it here too Benji an Jack 🥰🐶🐶💙💙💙
We will be back again
Again 🥰😍🥰

Fantastic 🤩 catch a tagged barramundi and win $$$
Great little shop with a magic coffee machine ☕️
Great stop to unwind. Unfortunately couldn't catch a fish 😔

We decided to try out glamping for the first time and we loved every bit of it; the scenery, hot chocolate by the fire. The tent was beautifully set up inside. They provided us with all the essentials. They even had some board games for us to use. The bathrooms weren't very far to walk to. We definitely recommend staying here. Thank you Mark & Ilze for making our stay a memorable one, we will definitely be back in the future.

This is a large, spacious, open campground which fits alot of vans, small and large, tents, boats, swags anything camping. Has boat ramp nearby, also offers glamping tents. Good fishing in the Lake, beautiful scenery and sunset and sunrises.
Helpful, friendly staff at the kiosk, rubbish bins, clean toilets and 3 min hot showers. There is no potable water.
Lots of shaded areas or open if you prefer. Plenty of flat areas, dogs allowed and all a short drive from Proserpine town or 40 mins drive to Airlie Beach. Todays prices are $10 per person, which is very good what is offered.
Highly recommended.
Views to die for. Sunsets are superb. Stay as long as you can.
We used own campervan. Beautiful spot and well maintained campground with clean flushing toilets and hot showers. $10 pp / day.
Unbelievable free camping spot (or very minimal). 59 mins from Arlie beach, fully worth it if you have a motorhome / self sufficient.

A magic destination for only $10 a night, wake up to a view  to die for, play, swim , fish (or try to catch one), there's showers toilets and a kiosk with basics and more open from 9 to 5, you will need your own power source and water so bring your solar panels, just spent three days there forgetting about the world and it was sensational.
My first time here.. the place very great!!
Lovely spot for a day out and a lovely iced coffee with a ice cream

Currently being forced to listen to a mix between gangster rap and country music at 0100 with no end in sight. Wouldn't be so bad if the singing that comes with it didn't sound like a couple of dogs attacking some screaming chickens. Nobody to contact, nobody checking. Such a pity.

Very lovely couple looking after the kiosk.
Only too happy to offer suggestions and answer questions.
They have enough stock in the kiosk for all those little things you forget.
10 out of 10 from me.😁
Absolutely beautiful spot! Well maintained, great amenities and staff are friendly!

not big campers so the glamping at lake Proserpine was absolutely perfect. picturesque setup and location. very comfortable for 2 and 2 dogs. service from mark and ilze went above and beyond. highly recommend for those that want to unwind and destress in nature

Loved spending a week here! Beautiful spot right on the lake and surprisingly there weren’t many bugs! The amenities are all very clean and serviced regularly. The staff were all super friendly and the groundskeeper Blake even took me to see a nearby waterfall which was awesome! I’ve been back once already and definitely will again in the future.
Only put our boat in. Didn't check service or accommodation. Nice drive there.

On site managers have no idea of the rules, we only ended up staying 1 night and took the other 3 caravans with us to Proserpine caravan park best move ever, Maybe they should read the website under Generator  use.

Always great camping. Beautiful vew and a nice breeze that makes it nice and cool at night. Mozzies were alright but did came out at night. Showers work well, slightly annoying angle of the shower head but not a big deal.
Best part was the staff. At night Blake came to see us since we arrived after reception closed. Super friendly had a nice chat. In the morning we went to reception to pay and there was Ilsa with her smile rocking up and helped us out. Great vibes and ultimate hospitality!
Very handy and covienient
Great camping spot
Spent 6 very relaxing days in our caravan.  Friendly helpful staff, great location to just chill out and enjoy life..
Nice n peaceful atm. Nice place to unwind.

Really nice cheap spot, if u want to just kick back or take the boat or hobie for a paddle this is it and you might even catch a barra, I did question the caretaker on a review saying there was crocs in here but was told no there wasn't,  the caretaker was a really nice woman who answered mg questions, got a coffee from kiosk and had a nice hot shower but be warned if your washing you hair and have thick hair like me, Waa it first before the hot water stops lol ,3 mins

Quite, relaxing, plenty of space to park up, near kiosk or down near lake. Bird life and cattle every where. Recommend highly. Bit windy at times no big deal. Clear nights stargazing amazing, kayak & Sups expensive hire, take you're own.  $10 pr prsn a night.
Love this place ❤️ bush settings are my favourite lovely couple run the place clean toilets and showers and a beautiful dam what more could you want
Lovely place peacful quite lovely clean amenities.  Good coffee  and chat with lovely young man running the office

What a find this is. Huge lake forall boating,fishing,jetski action.
Huge park, great for all size rigs. Super clean amenities every day. Spotless.✨️
Great Kiosk too with coffee ☕️
Mark and Ilze are like super hosts. So welcolming and friendly.👏👫
They make this location a must do.
Can also hire sups and kayaks.🛶
Nice change from the crazy busy of Airlie.
10/10 💕
Great night watchman. Keep on jiggin.
Absolutely 10/10- service, experience, location and accommodation an amazing all round stay. Ilze and Mark were super friendly. Our family had such an enjoyable time and I recommend anyone do this!

Not sure if we just stayed at a bad time of if it is often like this but the winds here were gusting. You can try to park strategically to block it out and our second night it just kept swinging around from different directions literally blowing our stuff off our table.
Outside of this its a nice place, kiosk open during the day with simple groceries, ice creams and coffee. There are fire pits scattered around different sites. You can park pretty close to the lake itself which is beautiful.
Saw advertised as a gateway to Airlie Beach and the Whitsundays - its an affordable option but its a decent distance away on the opposite side of the highway.

Camp managers are some of the loveliest people I have dealt with. The camp grounds have no power or water so make sure you have options. The ground is very hard too so screw in pegs are a must. The amenities are fine and the lake is a picturesque spot. It was very windy while we were there but that is outside of the grounds control. Also, fire pits are on site.
Great place for a weekend away. Just watch out for some big wind gusts.

Arrived late at night with huge visible signs advertised that the camp ground was $8 per person, per night. The following morning we further proceeded to read the Camp Proserpine brochures and pay inside the Kiosk which also stated $8 per person, per night. Upon payment my partner and I were charged $10 per person, per night. When asking for a refund on false advertising the gentleman was extremely hesitant on refunding and aggressively noted he would have to take it out of his own pocket. He stated the reason for the increase was because of the financial year change over in July. Um....It's now September. Maybe update your advertising?
Great camping spot, amenities were good and clean

Great camperground !
Amazing view on the lake, clean amenities, hot shower, everything was good 👍
Wow - this is a MUST DO regardless of how much camping/travelling you have done - fantastic experience!
Great place. Very friendly staff, reasonable pricing, and amenities are clean.
We loved in the Glamping tent highly recommended them.
Absolutely great place, plenty of room and beautiful scenery
Nice place to camp. We just drove through.
Beautiful lady in shop. So pleasant and helpful. Passionate about the Lake and its beauty.
Absolutely stunning spot. The sunsets were awesome.  Toilets and showers arevery clean. $10 per night, per person, loved it.

Nice little camp ground on the lake.
We got there before close of business BUT they had decided to close the office early, we even spoke to the lady from the office when we arrive as she was still there, but she didnt want to processes us until the morning but told us to go & find a site.

We were there for just one night leaving early in the morning so not there for 9am when office opened. They did a rego check walk around at some stage during the night. We had a NOTICE of demand on our windscreen because we were not registered guests & were 'trespassing'. Felt a bit full on and rude, considering we had done all the right things - got there early before office 'closed' & attempted to make payment but was refused although told to find a camp site.

We did ring & make payment during the day after we stopped travelling. Just really disappointed by this 'THREAT' when we had actually done all the right things but the camp manager decided to change to rules that day....
A lovely place to stay for a few days. Facilities were clean. It was a bit too busy for us and we weren't too happy to see fires lit on the grass.
Awesome location, great amenities that were clean for the entire stay, lovely service & only $10 a night pp. so good that we are planning to come back already (15 hours from home)
J7st beautiful and quiet.

Cheap camp ground $10 per person per night, they have toilets & showers - no drinking water on site.
Extremely windy!!! No areas to wash dishes, 1 tap available & you have to ask at the kiosk for the actual tap top.
Good clean reasonably priced campground with great views, amenity's, decent staff and a range of basic necessity's available in the office/shop...

Loved our time here, even thou the weather wasn't the best.
Will definitely be going back.
Had an absolutely fantastic stay.  Can take a walk to the wall.  Amenities very clean, great showers. Plenty of room for your own space

Nice place. 3 minute hot showers, clean bathrooms. No picnic areas, but there where day use areas like 1 km away. There was free wifi.
Not much to do or see around.
$10 per person and per night.
Lovely place. Although it has WIFI it was very hit and miss. Mostly miss. No phone service. Place could have a BBQ

Such a beautiful place . Make sure you fill your water tanks before coming up here...no water on site.
There is a fill point in Proserpine at the RV free camp behind the church ...

Wind can get extreme but so can the mosquitoes when it stops.... we will be back for sure ...

$10 per adult per night ...
Great hidden gem. Pick your own camping spot and there's plenty of room. Showers and toilets. The water access has a floating pontoon. Can park your boat next to it. $10/ night no complaints here.

Perfect location for peacefulness, sunsets, and lake walks. Clean showers and toilets and generous ability to run generators to charge up on cloudy days (not at night). But despite hundreds of campers only a couple of campers needed to do this, everyone respectful.
Awsome spot great sunsets $20 per night hot showers what more can you ask

Camping avec douches chaudes, toilettes et wifi (pas super performant, mais on capte bien en 4G). Pas mal de monde le weekend mais il y a beaucoup de places. C'était mon lieu de repos pour visiter Whitsunday depuis Airlie Beach et le survol de la grande barrière de corail
Food with great reasonably priced parking for large vehicles

We stayed overnight on our travels. Large area with plenty of places to set up camp. Staff very friendly. Dog friendly which was a huge plus for us. Several of the showers didn't seem to work - push button for hot water stuck pushed in. Access to water via jetty, difficult to get to water edge as lines of campers set up there.
Excellent spot! Peaceful location. Very clean amenities. Fantastic price. And absolute.

All unpowered and no water but toilets and showers are up near check in office.
Big camping variety in treed shady areas down towards dam edge in the open right onto edge.
Has floating pontoon down over the water.

It’s a very large and open and well known camp ground just out of Proserpine (know as the Proserpine Dam). The dam is large enough for speed boats and where I stayed with my family was the best spot, not far from the water near the Glamping Tents and a big area to ourselves with no close annoying neighbours/ other campers.
It’s cheap but best to go in the Dry Season (Winter) coz Easter School Holidays was still HOT and wet and not the best time of year.

Amenities (toilets and showers are basic but good).
A picturesque campsite. The staff were so very helpful.

Today we went for a drive to take in the sights around Proserpine, one of these was Lake Proserpine or Peter Faust Dam. What a bonza place. We were no sooner out of the car and were invited to view one of the Glamping tents by the camping ground hosts who was putting some finishing touches before the next "glampers" arrived. Wow this lady is a powerhouse and her enthusiasm and zest for life must rub off on all the campers as everyone appeared chilled and happy 😊. That visit certainly resonated with us and we talked and smiled about it all day. Not bad for a day visit, imagine what it would be like if we'd stayed there. 😘 Best wishes Ken, Dianne, Sue & Ken.
Great place except the 3 minute showers.. if you like a cold shower it's 5 stars.

Stayed overnight on our way up north. This place is amazing. Next time we'll stay during the week for a few nights. The camping area was full as it was a Saturday night but still very peaceful as we camped up behind the office.
Beautiful camping area with hot showers and toilets

Really awesome camping here!
Also amazing customer service!
Can get a little windy on the lake edge but so beautiful at sunset!
